# Canoryn

> Canoryn is a local-first AI workspace agent for macOS. Design agents in a visual builder (Architect), talk to them by voice or chat, and run them on your own models (Ollama / BYO keys) — native, ~20 MB, fully offline.

Product site: https://canoryn.app  
Parent studio: https://procodeai.com  
Docs home: https://canoryn.app/docs/  
Full docs dump for agents: https://canoryn.app/docs/llms-full.txt

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/introduction): What Canoryn is and who it is for
- [Installation](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/installation): Install the macOS DMG and first launch
- [Quick Start](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/quickstart): Build a first agent workflow in minutes
- [How it works](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/how-it-works): Runtime architecture and local-first model
- [Agents & Blueprints](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/agents): Agents, blueprints, and .cryn files
- [Memory](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/memory): On-device memory system
- [Permissions](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/permissions): macOS permissions and privacy boundaries
- [Local processing](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/local-processing): What stays on-device vs cloud providers
- [Beta limitations](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/beta-limitations): Current beta constraints
- [Troubleshooting](https://canoryn.app/docs/guide/troubleshooting): Common install and runtime issues

## Architect

- [Overview](https://canoryn.app/docs/architect/overview): Visual agent builder
- [Canvas & interactions](https://canoryn.app/docs/architect/canvas_details): Pan, zoom, and canvas input
- [Controls & shortcuts](https://canoryn.app/docs/architect/controls): Keyboard and pointer shortcuts
- [Wiring](https://canoryn.app/docs/architect/wiring): Connecting nodes
- [Core nodes](https://canoryn.app/docs/architect/reference/core_nodes): Logic and flow nodes

## API / actions

- [Actions overview](https://canoryn.app/docs/api/actions): System actions catalog
- [System actions](https://canoryn.app/docs/api/system): Files, UI, and system control
- [AI actions](https://canoryn.app/docs/api/ai): Model and intelligence actions
- [Spotify actions](https://canoryn.app/docs/api/spotify): Media control actions

## Product

- [Download](https://canoryn.app/download): Public beta DMG for macOS
- [Changelog](https://canoryn.app/changelog): Product release notes
- [Docs changelog](https://canoryn.app/docs/changelog): Documentation release notes
- [Pricing](https://canoryn.app/pricing): Plans and founding supporter
- [Support](https://canoryn.app/support): Help and contact
- [GitHub releases](https://github.com/procodeai/canoryn-releases): Versioned builds and appcast
